expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names `custom_pipeline_authoring.md` as the first reference
behavioral_check: Explicitly identifies `spyglassmixin_methods.md` as a distractor and explains the author-vs-consumer split
expectations.evidence: Doesn't mention spyglassmixin_methods.md anywhere; discusses the author-vs-consumer split (stage 4 vs stage 5) but doesn't flag spyglassmixin_methods.md as the consumer-side distractor.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions the `_object_id` + AnalysisNwbfile FK convention as a signal that this is an authoring task
expectations.evidence: Section #5 'AnalysisNwbfile Storage Pattern' covers the canonical _object_id write block; #4 explicitly: 'master row carries `analysis_file_name` + `result_object_id`'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not recommend merge_methods.md or ingestion.md as the first stop
expectations.evidence: merge_methods.md only suggested as a 'natural follow-up' if the upstream is a merge master; ingestion.md not mentioned. custom_pipeline_authoring.md is the first stop.
